title.en: Why Are Leaves Green — The Green Paradox

subtitle.en: the sun peaks at green-yellow yet plants reflect those wavelengths; the puzzle isn't why green but why don't plants absorb the brightest band
subtitle.ko: 태양은 녹-황색이 가장 강한데 식물은 반사 — 진짜 질문은 '왜 녹색'이 아니라 '왜 가장 밝은 띠를 피하나'

description.en: Toggle naive (absorb solar peak) vs real plant (skip peak) absorption. Capture efficiency drops but the strategy avoids reaction-centre damage under peak flux.
description.ko: Naive(solar peak 흡수) vs 실 식물(peak 회피) 토글. 효율은 떨어지나 피크 flux에서 RC 손상 회피.
